title: Takatak
subTitle: Two sisters, Kamakshi and Minakshi, live a carefree life. While Kamakshi is married to a porn addict, her sister Minakshi is trapped in a love triangle.

title: Redu
subTitle: Tatu, a middle-aged man, chances upon a radio that changes his life for good. However, he is shattered when he loses his prized possession and sets out on a journey to reclaim it.

title: Patil
subTitle: Krishna, a student, falls in love with Pushpa, the sister of a political goon. However, circumstances force him to quit studies and move to Mumbai.

subTitle: An ordinary man moves to the city with his mother after inheriting his uncle's wealth. However, disappointed with his new life, he gives up his fortune for love and simplicity.

subTitle: Kalash's confrontation incites Anaji's wrath, leading to a tense exchange. Meanwhile, Shambu Raje struggles to decipher Rajmata's cryptic message.

title: Aamhi Saare Khavayye
subTitle: The host invites various celebrities and ordinary people into his kitchen to prepare delectable recipes and provide tips and tricks on kitchen chores and cooking.

title: Navri Mile Navryala
subTitle: Servants from two households try to persuade their strict bosses to relax tough rules, aiming to make the houses feel more like homes despite different discipline styles in each family.

title: Khulta Kali Khulena
subTitle: Khulta Kali Khulena

title: Bayko Chukli Standvar
subTitle: In order to make ends meet, Lakshya decides to come to Mumbai along with Hausa, his wife. However, things take a turn when his spouse goes missing in the middle of their journey.

subTitle: Testimonials shared on the activities of Anand Dighe, an illustrious Hindu nationalist leader, reveal the impact left by him on the community of Thane residents.

title: Swarajya Rakshak Sambhaji

subTitle: In pre-colonial Karnataka, during the Kadamba dynasty era, the ritual of Bhuta Kola takes root in the culture. Meanwhile, the seeds for the rise of Kaadubettu Shiva are also sown.
